title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant from Google is a quantization technique that combines KV cache quantization and vector quantization to reduce VRAM requirements and improve efficiency on graphics cards. The method uses codebook-based approaches and optimizes for mean squared error and inner product error to compress model data.
